name: thrall-activates
prompt: Medium shot, low angle. Young woman with deep red wavy disheveled hair, white shirt unbuttoned showing collarbone, clinging to damp flushed skin. Heat shimmer radiating visibly from her body, air thick with warm distortion. Standing in dormitory room. Amber glow intensifying around her figure. Expression overwhelmed, eyes unfocused. Vanity with fogged mirror visible behind. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: My body is reaching for her, and she isn't here.

bubble: Internal thought from Senna, figure CENTER, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue

sfx.description: low warm resonance building, like a body radiating heat, muffled heartbeat

name: scarf-lower
prompt: Close-up of young woman holding a pale blue silk scarf against her collarbone. Frost traces on fabric melting slightly. Wearing ONLY a loose white shirt partially unbuttoned, no blazer, no jacket. Eyes half-closed. Warm amber lighting. Heat shimmer around body. Intense emotional expression. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: fantasy-dissolve
prompt: Abstract fantasy panel. Warm amber energy meeting cool blue frost, ice crystals fracturing and melting. Two overlapping color fields — deep red warmth consuming pale blue cold. Dreamlike blurred atmosphere, soft edges dissolving. No figures visible. Abstract effects panel. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: She can't tell the difference between warmth and want and she stops resisting and she opens —

bubble: Internal thought from Senna (off-panel), place thought bubble CENTER as internal monologue overlaying abstract imagery
